body: ClimateMachine.jl [uses Thermodynamics.jl's tested profiles](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimateMachine.jl/blob/master/test/Atmos/prog_prim_conversion/runtests.jl#L110) for primitive-prognostic conversions. This PR makes those profiles available via a submodule in `src/`.
title: Make tested profiles accessible in submodule
